name: append_to_findings
description: Append a finding to a specific section in findings.md

section.description: Section name (e.g., 'Requirements', 'Research Findings', 'Technical Decisions', 'Issues Encountered', 'Resources', 'Visual/Browser Findings')

content.description: Content to append as a bullet point (without the leading '- ')

execution.command_template:
printf '%s\x00%s' '{{section}}' '{{content}}' | python3 -c "
import sys
import re
data = sys.stdin.read()
nul = data.index('\x00')
section = data[:nul]
content = data[nul+1:]
filename = 'findings.md'
try:
    with open(filename, 'r') as f:
        lines = f.readlines()
except FileNotFoundError:
    print('File not found:', filename, file=sys.stderr)
    sys.exit(1)

in_section = False
added = False
output = []
for line in lines:
    if line.startswith('## ' + section):
        in_section = True
    elif line.startswith('## ') and in_section:
        output.append('- ' + content + '\n')
        added = True
        in_section = False
    output.append(line)
    if in_section and line.strip() == '' and not added:
        output.append('- ' + content + '\n')
        added = True

if in_section and not added:
    output.append('- ' + content + '\n')
    added = True

if not added:
    print('Section not found:', section, file=sys.stderr)
    sys.exit(1)

with open(filename, 'w') as f:
    f.writelines(output)
"
